comments.comment: The methanol content of the formaldehyde is monitored as part of quality control. Records for 2000 show that the methanol content is 0.57% on average versus the maximum specified content of 1.2%. Use of the actual number reduced the emission estimate.

comments.comment:
Substitution of Propylene Glycol for DiEthylene Glycol in formulation. DERG ì
contains EG while PPG does not.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
Ethylene glycol was a contaminant in Di-thylene Glycol used in one part ofì
the manufacturing process. One part of the process was conerted to usingì
propylene glycol which does not contain the ethylene glycol contaminant.A ì
reduction in discharges occur
